claim: SmolLM3 at 3B parameters trained on 11 trillion tokens, beating 4B-sized models while supporting 128K context window
actionable: Benchmark SmolLM3 against larger models for mobile or edge deployment scenarios where model size is critical
source_title: SmolLM3 - A Small Reasoner with Tool Use

claim: SmolLM3 supports togglable thinking mode with low-effort, default, and reasoning budget modes for latency-cost tradeoffs
actionable: Use low-effort thinking for simple tasks, default for balanced reasoning, and budget mode for complex reasoning with explicit token caps
source_title: SmolLM3 - A Small Reasoner with Tool Use

claim: Hugging Face released full training blueprint showing architecture, data mix, long context training, and post-training recipes
actionable: Use Hugging Face SmolLM3 blueprint to understand and reproduce key training techniques for your own smaller models
source_title: SmolLM3 - A Small Reasoner with Tool Use

claim: SmolLM3 can perform function calling with proper tool definition in OpenAI format without special setup
actionable: Use SmolLM3 for tool calling in lightweight agent applications; define tools in OpenAI schema for compatibility
source_title: SmolLM3 - A Small Reasoner with Tool Use

claim: SmolLM3 sometimes generates empty thinking tags for code generation tasks, suggesting thinking quality depends on task type
actionable: Test SmolLM3 thinking mode on your specific task types; some tasks may not benefit from reasoning despite mode being enabled
source_title: SmolLM3 - A Small Reasoner with Tool Use
